UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. (BANA) AND RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S MOTION TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARS PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL OF RECORD HAS BEEN UNABLE TO PRACTICE LAW SINCE SEPTEMBER 16, 2012 (PER BAR RECORD); HENCE, MOVING PARTY SHOULD SERVE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER RE DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH, NOT REPORTED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Off Calendar

Mtn To Dismiss With Prejudice
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria-Nicolle Beringer (801-907-6900), appearing via CourtCall, of Akerman Senterfitt for Bank of America, defendant and moving party / Annabelle D. Abrigo (650-438-2817) plaintiff and opposing party

DISCUSSION - Plaintiff states her address is: 175 Rae Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94112. Defendant's counsel is to use that address when sending notice to plaintiff. The tentative ruling is adopted as modified: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. (BANA) and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S Motion to Dismiss With Prejudice is denied without prejudice. Appears plaintiff's counsel of record has been unable to practice law since September 16, 2012 (per Bar record); hence, moving party should serve notice of entry of order re demurrer to plaintiff. Plaintiff is to amend the complaint within ten (10) days of notice of entry of this order. Defendant to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Imran Hayat (213-688-9500) of Akerman Senterfitt for Bank of America and Reonctrust Company, defendants and moving parties / Anthony D. Agpaoa (415-989-1476) of law Offices of Anthony D. Agpaoa for Anabelle D. Abrigo, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Bank of America and Recontrust Company's Demurrer to Complaint is sustained with leave to amend, to amend as to all causes of action to allege in good faith facts to support each cause of action. Moving party to prepare order in conformity with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
